property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Users\simen\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\mingw64\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\local\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\mingw64\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin;C:\Users\simen\bin;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-17.0.16.8-hotspot\bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA NvDLISR;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Users\simen\Downloads\apache-maven-3.9.13-bin\apache-maven-3.9.13\bin;C:\Users\simen\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Launcher;C:\Users\simen\.local\bin;C:\Users\simen\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\simen\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\simen\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin\vendor_perl;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin\core_perl;.

testcase.name: testAddressSize

error.message: Cannot invoke "java.math.BigInteger.compareTo(java.math.BigInteger)" because the return value of "no.hvl.dat110.util.Hash.addressSize()" is null
